archetype: Archetype 2 (Performance Pro / Command Center) & Archetype 4 (Swiss High-Contrast)

rules: Headings MUST use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight)
Overlines and labels MUST be uppercase with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em])
Monospace MUST be used for all logs, metrics data points, and event streams

layout_and_spacing.grid_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 or gap-6
rules: Every pixel must be utilized. No jagged bottoms; use h-full to stretch children.
Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-4 or p-6).
Dense and compact spacing for data-heavy sections.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:border-white/20 transition-colors
surfaces.terminal_panel: bg-black border border-white/10 rounded-lg font-mono text-xs p-4 overflow-y-auto

buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all

specific_ui.live_workflow_graph: Use @xyflow/react (React Flow) for node-edge graph. Nodes should have solid #141414 backgrounds, sharp borders colored by status (Green/Cyan/Red), and animated dashed edges representing data flow.
specific_ui.event_streaming: Terminal style list. Each log entry should have a timestamp (text-muted), log level (colored), and message (text-secondary). Auto-scroll to bottom.
specific_ui.ai_brain_panel: Show pulsing/glowing indicator for 'AI Active'. Use typewriter effect or staggered fade-in for AI explanations. High contrast text.
specific_ui.metrics: Use Recharts. Line charts for latency/throughput with minimal grid lines, area gradients under lines, colored by status.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Borders brighten (border-white/20), subtle lift or background lighten.
animations: Micro-interactions on buttons (scale down 0.98 on click).
Data pulses: For live metrics, slightly pulse the metric value when it updates.
Graph edges: Use animated SVG dashed lines for flow visualization.

media.icons: lucide-react (Dense, clean stroke icons. Size 16px or 20px).

image_urls.description: Abstract green/cyan light trails on black. Use at low opacity (10-15%) in the hero/header or sidebar background for texture.

media.logos: Use Lucide 'Cpu' or 'Network' icon with text 'NEXUS_AI' or 'AUTO_FLOW' as the brand logo.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG standards. No dark gray text on black background.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a sidebar layout for navigation, with main content area organized using CSS Grid (12 cols).
Install @xyflow/react for the workflow graph and recharts for metrics.
Use framer-motion for smooth log list entry animations and AI pulsing dots.
Ensure terminal logs are in a fixed height container with overflow-y-auto and styled scrollbars.
Mock WebSocket data with setInterval generating random logs and metric updates.
Implement Shadcn UI for dropdowns, dialogues, and tabs (e.g., switching between log views).
